description: Synthetic governed learning memory for Agentathon evaluation. Advisory only; not model training and not policy.

artifacts.title: Healthcare analytics vendor missing model-training exclusion
artifacts.reviewerNotes: Reviewer accepted conditional onboarding only after DPA amendment added explicit model-training exclusion and human review boundary.
addedControls: Require signed model-training exclusion for patient or customer data before production.
Confirm DPA amendment covers analytics support, subprocessors, retention, deletion, and cross-border review.
Add reviewer question: Has any analytics data been used for model improvement or service training?
rejectedEvidence: Generic analytics security overview without data-use terms

artifacts.title: SaaS vendor missing subprocessor list
artifacts.reviewerNotes: Reviewer allowed conditional approval after supplier supplied current subprocessor register and change-notification terms.
addedControls: Require current subprocessor register before approval.
Require 30-day subprocessor change notification and right to object.
Add reviewer question: Are support and hosting locations consistent with transfer assessment?
rejectedEvidence: MSA reference to subprocessors without attached register

artifacts.title: AI vendor permitted customer-data training
artifacts.reviewerNotes: Reviewer rejected onboarding because product terms permitted customer-data training and no enterprise opt-out was executed.
addedControls: Reject or escalate when customer-data model training is permitted and no signed opt-out exists.
Require signed model-training exclusion and human oversight plan before reconsideration.
Add reviewer question: Does the vendor use prompts, tickets, or submitted records for model improvement?

artifacts.title: Complete vendor package approved with monitoring
artifacts.reviewerNotes: Reviewer approved with monitoring because DPA, SOC 2, retention, deletion, subprocessors, and transfer mechanism were complete.
addedControls: Keep annual SOC 2 and ISO evidence refresh on reviewer calendar.
Monitor subprocessor changes and retention exceptions quarterly.
Confirm accountable human owner before operational approval.

artifacts.title: Cross-border SaaS missing retention schedule
artifacts.reviewerNotes: Reviewer required retention schedule, deletion assistance, and hosting/support geography confirmation before production use.
addedControls: Require retention schedule and deletion assistance evidence.
Require cross-border transfer mechanism and support-region confirmation.
Add reviewer question: Are any support teams accessing records outside approved regions?
rejectedEvidence: Security overview without retention or deletion commitments
